---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement for Quoriv
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / use case

What problem are you trying to solve? Describe the situation where Quoriv doesn't do what you need.

## Proposed solution

What would you like Quoriv to do? Be as concrete as you can — example commands, expected output, configuration snippets.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about and why you ruled them out.

## Additional context

Related issues, links to similar features in other tools, or anything else that helps.

## Are you willing to contribute this?

- [ ] Yes, I can submit a PR
- [ ] Yes, with some guidance
- [ ] No, just suggesting
